pattern: Could you possibly ...?
b1: Could you possibly help me with this box?
Could you possibly send me the address again?
Could you possibly open the window for me?
Could you possibly wait a few minutes?
Could you possibly check this email for mistakes?
b2: Could you possibly reschedule our meeting to next Thursday?
Could you possibly provide more information about the project?
Could you possibly explain how this software works?
Could you possibly give me some feedback on my presentation?
Could you possibly introduce me to the marketing manager?
c1: Could you possibly elaborate on the long-term implications of this decision?
Could you possibly facilitate a meeting between the two departments?
Could you possibly clarify the discrepancies found in the quarterly report?
Could you possibly extend the deadline considering the recent complications?
Could you possibly authorize a budget increase for the upcoming campaign?

pattern: I would be grateful if you could ...
b1: I would be grateful if you could answer my question.
I would be grateful if you could send the pictures.
I would be grateful if you could call me back.
I would be grateful if you could help me clean.
I would be grateful if you could show me the way.
b2: I would be grateful if you could provide a reference for my job application.
I would be grateful if you could review the attached document.
I would be grateful if you could confirm your attendance by Friday.
I would be grateful if you could share your expertise on this topic.
I would be grateful if you could look into this issue as soon as possible.
c1: I would be grateful if you could provide a comprehensive analysis of the market trends.
I would be grateful if you could expedite the approval process for this proposal.
I would be grateful if you could assist us in navigating these legal requirements.
I would be grateful if you could offer your perspective on the strategic alignment.
I would be grateful if you could ensure all stakeholders are informed of the changes.

pattern: Would you mind ...?
b1: Would you mind closing the door?
Would you mind helping me with my homework?
Would you mind speaking more slowly?
Would you mind taking a photo for us?
Would you mind waiting here for a moment?
b2: Would you mind explaining the main points of the contract again?
Would you mind proofreading my report before I submit it?
Would you mind switching seats with me so I can sit with my friend?
Would you mind if I borrowed your laptop for the presentation?
Would you mind handling the client's request while I'm away?
c1: Would you mind delineating the specific responsibilities of each team member?
Would you mind reconsidering your stance in light of the new evidence?
Would you mind accommodating our request for an earlier delivery date?
Would you mind overseeing the implementation of the new safety protocols?
Would you mind providing a detailed breakdown of the projected costs?

pattern: I'm writing to request ...
b1: I'm writing to request more information about the course.
I'm writing to request a refund for this shirt.
I'm writing to request a meeting with you.
I'm writing to request some help with my visa.
I'm writing to request a copy of the menu.
b2: I'm writing to request a formal extension for the project deadline.
I'm writing to request permission to use the conference room.
I'm writing to request a letter of recommendation from you.
I'm writing to request access to the company's private database.
I'm writing to request a replacement for the damaged goods I received.
c1: I'm writing to request a comprehensive review of our current partnership agreement.
I'm writing to request a waiver for the administrative fees involved.
I'm writing to request your professional intervention in this ongoing dispute.
I'm writing to request a detailed clarification regarding the new tax regulations.
I'm writing to request an urgent consultation regarding the strategic merger.

pattern: I need ... by the end of ...
b1: I need your answer by the end of the day.
I need the book back by the end of the week.
I need the money by the end of the month.
I need to finish this by the end of the class.
I need to know your plan by the end of tomorrow.
b2: I need the final report on my desk by the end of the business day.
I need a confirmed guest list by the end of the week.
I need all the invoices processed by the end of the quarter.
I need your feedback on the draft by the end of the weekend.
I need the updated schedule by the end of the afternoon.
c1: I need a preliminary assessment of the risks by the end of the fiscal year.
I need the legal counsel's opinion by the end of the current session.
I need a thorough evaluation of the proposal by the end of the month.
I need all departmental budgets finalized by the end of the week.
I need a strategic plan for the product launch by the end of the quarter.

pattern: Is there any chance of ...?
b1: Is there any chance of getting a discount?
Is there any chance of meeting you today?
Is there any chance of winning the game?
Is there any chance of finishing early?
Is there any chance of more cake?
b2: Is there any chance of extending the warranty on this product?
Is there any chance of upgrading my seat to business class?
Is there any chance of getting a refund even without a receipt?
Is there any chance of postponing the meeting until next week?
Is there any chance of increasing the project budget?
c1: Is there any chance of reconsidering the terms of the acquisition?
Is there any chance of securing additional funding for this research?
Is there any chance of negotiating a more flexible delivery schedule?
Is there any chance of resolving the conflict through mediation?
Is there any chance of accelerating the production timeline?

pattern: Could I ask you to specifically focus on ...?
b1: Could I ask you to specifically focus on your homework?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on the spelling?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on the pictures?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on the grammar?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on the time?
b2: Could I ask you to specifically focus on the customer feedback section?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on the financial risks involved?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on the design of the website?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on improving our efficiency?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on the target audience's needs?
c1: Could I ask you to specifically focus on the socio-economic impact of the policy?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on the qualitative aspects of the study?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on identifying potential systemic flaws?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on the long-term sustainability of the model?
Could I ask you to specifically focus on the ethical implications of the new technology?

pattern: Please make sure to include ...
b1: Please make sure to include your name on the test.
Please make sure to include your phone number.
Please make sure to include some fruit in the box.
Please make sure to include the receipt.
Please make sure to include all the files.
b2: Please make sure to include a summary at the beginning of the report.
Please make sure to include all relevant references in your bibliography.
Please make sure to include the latest sales figures in the presentation.
Please make sure to include the terms and conditions in the contract.
Please make sure to include a call-to-action in the marketing email.
c1: Please make sure to include a detailed risk mitigation strategy in the proposal.
Please make sure to include an executive summary for the senior management.
Please make sure to include empirical evidence to support your claims.
Please make sure to include a comprehensive analysis of the competitor landscape.
Please make sure to include diverse perspectives during the consultative process.

pattern: Would it be possible for you to provide details on ...?
kor: ...에 대한 세부 사항을 알려주실 수 있을까요?
b1: Would it be possible for you to provide details on the price?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the party?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the menu?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the room?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the bus schedule?
b2: Would it be possible for you to provide details on the new marketing plan?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the technical specifications?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the employee benefits package?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the project timeline?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the refund policy?
c1: Would it be possible for you to provide details on the underlying methodology?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the fiscal implications of the project?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the legal framework governing this area?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the anticipated challenges of the integration?
Would it be possible for you to provide details on the long-term strategic objectives?

pattern: Unfortunately, I won't be able to ...
kor: 안타깝게도, 제가 ...할 수 없을 것 같습니다
b1: Unfortunately, I won't be able to come to the party.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to help you today.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to finish this now.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to see you on Sunday.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to buy that car.
b2: Unfortunately, I won't be able to attend the meeting due to a prior commitment.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to complete the report by the original deadline.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to provide the information you requested at this time.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to join the team for dinner tonight.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to accept the job offer as it is.
c1: Unfortunately, I won't be able to facilitate the workshop due to unforeseen circumstances.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to accommodate such a significant change in the scope.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to authorize any further expenditure this quarter.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to represent the firm at the upcoming conference.
Unfortunately, I won't be able to provide a definitive answer until the audit is complete.

pattern: I'm afraid I have to decline ...
b1: I'm afraid I have to decline your invitation.
I'm afraid I have to decline the offer.
I'm afraid I have to decline this job.
I'm afraid I have to decline your help.
I'm afraid I have to decline the request.
b2: I'm afraid I have to decline the invitation to speak at the event.
I'm afraid I have to decline the proposed terms of the agreement.
I'm afraid I have to decline your request for a salary increase at this moment.
I'm afraid I have to decline the opportunity to collaborate on this project.
I'm afraid I have to decline the suggested changes to the design.
c1: I'm afraid I have to decline the nomination due to conflicting interests.
I'm afraid I have to decline the proposal as it does not align with our core strategy.
I'm afraid I have to decline the request for additional resources given the current constraints.
I'm afraid I have to decline the invitation to participate in the panel discussion.
I'm afraid I have to decline the offer of settlement under the present conditions.

pattern: That sounds challenging because ...
kor: ... 때문에 그것은 조금 어려울 것 같네요 (도전적이네요)
b1: That sounds challenging because I am busy.
That sounds challenging because it's very expensive.
That sounds challenging because I don't have a car.
That sounds challenging because I don't speak the language.
That sounds challenging because the time is too short.
b2: That sounds challenging because we have limited resources at the moment.
That sounds challenging because it requires a high level of technical expertise.
That sounds challenging because the market is very competitive right now.
That sounds challenging because it would require a complete change in our strategy.
That sounds challenging because we need approval from the board first.
c1: That sounds challenging because the regulatory landscape is constantly shifting.
That sounds challenging because it involves managing multiple complex stakeholders.
That sounds challenging because of the inherent volatility of the global economy.
That sounds challenging because it requires a paradigm shift in our organizational culture.
That sounds challenging because the data available is insufficient for a thorough analysis.

pattern: While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse ...
b1: While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the cake.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse your help.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the gift.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the job.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the invitation.
b2: While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the promotion at this time.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse to participate in the study.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the partnership proposal.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the discount.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the extra work.
c1: While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the appointment for personal reasons.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the consultancy role.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse to be a co-author on this paper.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the invitation to join the board.
While I appreciate the offer, I must respectfully refuse the compensation package as proposed.

pattern: My schedule doesn't permit me to ...
kor: 제 일정이 ...하는 것을 허락하지 않네요 (시간이 안 되네요)
b1: My schedule doesn't permit me to go to the party.
My schedule doesn't permit me to meet you today.
My schedule doesn't permit me to take a break.
My schedule doesn't permit me to travel this month.
My schedule doesn't permit me to help you right now.
b2: My schedule doesn't permit me to take on any new projects at the moment.
My schedule doesn't permit me to attend the full three-day conference.
My schedule doesn't permit me to have a long meeting this week.
My schedule doesn't permit me to volunteer for the event next weekend.
My schedule doesn't permit me to respond to every inquiry individually.
c1: My schedule doesn't permit me to provide the level of commitment required for this role.
My schedule doesn't permit me to travel internationally for the foreseeable future.
My schedule doesn't permit me to engage in a long-term collaborative effort at this stage.
My schedule doesn't permit me to conduct a thorough review of your manuscript this month.
My schedule doesn't permit me to participate in the upcoming series of seminars.

pattern: I wish I could ..., but currently I'm occupied with ...
kor: ...할 수 있으면 좋겠지만, 지금은 ... 때문에 바쁩니다
b1: I wish I could help you, but currently I'm occupied with my homework.
I wish I could go out, but currently I'm occupied with cleaning.
I wish I could talk, but currently I'm occupied with cooking.
I wish I could visit, but currently I'm occupied with work.
I wish I could play, but currently I'm occupied with reading.
b2: I wish I could join the committee, but currently I'm occupied with a major product launch.
I wish I could attend your wedding, but currently I'm occupied with a business trip abroad.
I wish I could help you with the move, but currently I'm occupied with my own relocation.
I wish I could review your proposal, but currently I'm occupied with the annual audit.
I wish I could mentor you, but currently I'm occupied with managing a large team.
c1: I wish I could provide a more detailed analysis, but currently I'm occupied with finalizing the fiscal report.
I wish I could dedicate more time to this initiative, but currently I'm occupied with several high-priority cases.
I wish I could participate in the research project, but currently I'm occupied with my own doctoral thesis.
I wish I could assist in the negotiations, but currently I'm occupied with restructuring the department.
I wish I could accept the speaking engagement, but currently I'm occupied with a series of overseas lectures.

pattern: We can revisit ... later.
b1: We can revisit this idea later.
We can revisit the price later.
We can revisit our plan later.
We can revisit the rules later.
We can revisit the location later.
b2: We can revisit the marketing strategy after we see the initial results.
We can revisit the issue of staff bonuses at the next meeting.
We can revisit the design choices once the prototype is ready.
We can revisit the budget allocation during the mid-year review.
We can revisit the possibility of a partnership in the future.
c1: We can revisit the long-term sustainability goals once the immediate crisis is resolved.
We can revisit the ethical implications of the project as it evolves.
We can revisit the contractual terms upon the completion of the first phase.
We can revisit the proposed methodology after the preliminary data is analyzed.
We can revisit the strategic direction of the company at the next board meeting.

pattern: I recommend speaking to ... about ...
b1: I recommend speaking to the teacher about your grade.
I recommend speaking to your doctor about your health.
I recommend speaking to the manager about the job.
I recommend speaking to your parents about the trip.
I recommend speaking to your friend about the problem.
b2: I recommend speaking to the HR department about the new policy.
I recommend speaking to a financial advisor about your investments.
I recommend speaking to the IT team about your computer issues.
I recommend speaking to a lawyer about the terms of the contract.
I recommend speaking to our marketing expert about the social media campaign.
c1: I recommend speaking to the chief architect about the structural limitations.
I recommend speaking to the ethics committee about the proposed study.
I recommend speaking to the head of operations about the logistical challenges.
I recommend speaking to a consultant about the organizational restructuring.
I recommend speaking to the primary stakeholders about the strategic shift.

pattern: My priority right now is ..., so I must decline.
kor: 지금 제 우선순위는 ...라서, 거절해야 할 것 같습니다
b1: My priority right now is studying, so I must decline.
My priority right now is my family, so I must decline.
My priority right now is health, so I must decline.
My priority right now is resting, so I must decline.
My priority right now is work, so I must decline.
b2: My priority right now is finishing the current project, so I must decline any new tasks.
My priority right now is improving my mental health, so I must decline the invitation.
My priority right now is saving money, so I must decline the expensive trip.
My priority right now is preparing for my exams, so I must decline the job offer.
My priority right now is training my new team, so I must decline the extra responsibilities.
c1: My priority right now is the successful integration of the new system, so I must decline the offer.
My priority right now is ensuring the long-term stability of the firm, so I must decline the expansion plan.
My priority right now is fulfilling my existing commitments, so I must decline the board position.
My priority right now is the completion of my research, so I must decline all speaking engagements.
My priority right now is addressing the immediate departmental issues, so I must decline the invitation.

pattern: Could you please clarify what you mean by ...?
kor: ...이 무슨 뜻인지 명확히 해주실 수 있을까요?
b1: Could you please clarify what you mean by 'soon'?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'late'?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'expensive'?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'help'?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'this'?
b2: Could you please clarify what you mean by 'flexible working hours'?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'performance-based bonuses'?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'a significant improvement'?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'limited resources'?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'the project scope'?
c1: Could you please clarify what you mean by 'strategic alignment' in this context?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'the inherent volatility' of the market?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'a paradigm shift' in consumer behavior?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'the socio-economic implications' of the study?
Could you please clarify what you mean by 'the qualitative assessment' of the results?

pattern: If you could just ..., that would be a great help.
kor: ...만 해주신다면 큰 도움이 될 것 같습니다
b1: If you could just send the email, that would be a great help.
If you could just wait here, that would be a great help.
If you could just tell me the time, that would be a great help.
If you could just open the door, that would be a great help.
If you could just call me, that would be a great help.
b2: If you could just provide a brief summary, that would be a great help.
If you could just introduce me to the CEO, that would be a great help.
If you could just share your notes with me, that would be a great help.
If you could just review the first chapter, that would be a great help.
If you could just confirm the date of the meeting, that would be a great help.
c1: If you could just provide a breakdown of the expenses, that would be a great help.
If you could just facilitate the initial contact with the client, that would be a great help.
If you could just clarify the legal requirements, that would be a great help.
If you could just offer your expert opinion on the matter, that would be a great help.
If you could just streamline the approval process, that would be a great help.
